title: Daily War Room
summary: Research and governance remain active. Communication, paid media and mobilization remain gated until evidence and human approvals are sufficient.

signals.title: Definitive municipal ballot accounting remains unresolved
signals.summary: The current evidence baseline identifies the preliminary JRV 5401 condition but does not authenticate a definitive municipal accounting source.
signals.source: Evidence Control Room: EV-0112, EV-0144 and EV-0145 reconciliation
signals.assessment: The known preliminary conflict is bounded but cannot support participation, abstention or final ballot-category claims.
signals.decisionRequired: Approve continued source discovery as the next evidence workstream; do not promote preliminary values.
blockers: Documento No. 4, final TSE/JED consolidation or competent resolution is not authenticated
options: Maintain the current bounded partial reconciliation

signals.title: Candidate identity baseline is not registered
signals.summary: The product memory requires identity, trajectory, values and proof points before positioning or public narrative work.
signals.source: Campaign Team Command Center operational snapshot
signals.assessment: A structured candidate interview is a prerequisite for brand and reputation work; no identity attributes should be invented.
signals.decisionRequired: Authorize a candidate identity interview and identify the human reviewer for the resulting biography.
blockers: Candidate interview and reviewed biography are not registered

signals.title: Operating team roster and responsibility matrix are absent
signals.summary: The campaign cannot assign accountable operational work until human roles, availability and approval authority are documented.
signals.source: Campaign current state and Team Command Center
signals.assessment: An internal RACI-like responsibility matrix is needed before the War Room can move assignments beyond placeholders.
signals.decisionRequired: Name the human Campaign Director or temporary operating owner and authorize team-intake collection.
blockers: Human team roster is not approved

risks.title: Premature strategy generation
risks.mitigation: Keep segment, narrative, paid media and mobilization gates closed until approved evidence and decisions exist.

risks.title: Operational ownership ambiguity
risks.mitigation: Do not convert draft assignments into commitments until a human owner accepts responsibility.

learning.statement: Runtime and visual validation must be completed before progressing to the next product surface.

safetyStatement: This War Room organizes evidence and pending internal decisions. It does not execute political, financial, communications or citizen-contact actions.
